title: JiDion rejects Alex Rosen partnership after his $10,000 ChudTheBuilder bond contribution raises questions
summary_full: YouTuber JiDion has ended his partnership with Alex Rosen after Rosen donated $10,000 toward the bond of Dalton Eatherly, known online as ChudTheBuilder. Speaking to followers, JiDion said the money could have supported more meaningful causes and called the donation unacceptable. The controversy has sparked widespread discussion online and brought renewed attention to both creators.
